body:
DIRECTIVE: FORGE-4D DENSE — install the attached FORGE-4D-DENSE.md as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md, replacing the prior forge-4d. tungsten-forge v2.0's discipline is inherited ABSOLUTELY and unchanged. Read it entire before acting. This contains the single most important discovery of the programme, and it changes what TUNGSTEN must be.

== WHAT WAS DONE ==
Every remaining unexplored dimension was tested on 65k real bars (cross-pair excluded per Manuel).
FOUND -- real edge we had never looked for:
 - TRIPLE CONDITIONING: session x displacement x volatility. ASIA x near x cold = +1.138 ATR (n=1778, p<0.0001). ASIA x far-below x cold = +0.945 (n=6326, p<0.0001). NY x far-below x cold = +0.914 (n=3493). Large, significant, and we NEVER LOOKED because we only ever sliced 1-2 dimensions and feared thin cells.
 - DAY-OF-WEEK, never once examined: Friday +1.419 ATR (p<0.0001), Monday +0.483, Tuesday flat. A free, enormous conditioning dimension in plain sight. A gradient-boosted model independently ranked day-of-week as its #1 feature (0.34), confirming it.
REFUTED -- ship these, they close doors permanently:
 - LONG HORIZON (to 1000 bars): information does NOT grow with horizon. No hiding place for bigger edge.
 - PATH SHAPE (slope/curvature/straightness/skew of last 50 bars): all p>0.12. The shape adds nothing beyond the endpoint.
 - NONLINEAR LEARNERS: GradientBoosting OOS IC=-0.010, and its top-decile predictions earned LESS than its bottom-decile. It overfits and inverts.

== THE DISCOVERY (this is the whole directive) ==
We then built the obvious machine: condition on the measured dimensions, enforce n>=500, shrink by significance, validate out-of-sample. Result: -1.204 ATR, t=-11.31. IT INVERTED -- reliably, massively, significantly. We suspected drift (train window +0.351 ATR vs test +0.746), de-meaned properly (learn the DEVIATION not the LEVEL -- basic hygiene we had skipped). Result: -1.012 ATR, t=-10.68. STILL INVERTED.
So we tracked the strongest cells across 5 sequential windows:
   ASIA far-below cold:  +3.75  +1.61  -0.63  -0.56  +0.51
   ASIA near cold:       +3.27  -0.93  -1.01  +0.24  +2.66
   LON far-below cold:   -1.13  -0.36  +2.22  +2.12  +2.69
THE LAW OF THE LIVING EDGE: every conditional edge in this market is REAL, LARGE, and NON-STATIONARY AT THE SIGN LEVEL. It does not decay toward zero. IT INVERTS, AND INVERTS AGAIN.
THIS EXPLAINS EVERY FAILURE WE HAVE EVER HAD. Every calibration overfits because it learns a sign that is already flipping. Every holdout collapses -19..-44pp because holdout is a LATER WINDOW and the sign changed in between. Every audit found 'no edge on average' because AVERAGING OVER SIGN-FLIPS YIELDS ZERO -- the edge was never absent, it was CANCELLING ITSELF OUT IN OUR MEASUREMENT.
Power floors, shrinkage, walk-forward, null-ghost -- ALL of them defend against NOISE. NONE defends against a SIGN-FLIP. A cell with n=6,326 and p<0.0001 is not noisy. It is simply about to reverse.
And the obvious fix fails too: rolling adaptive re-estimation (recent 8k bars, refit every bar) = -0.541 ATR, t=-3.08. ALSO INVERTED -- because by the time a window is long enough to measure the cell significantly, the cell has already flipped. Adaptation always trades the LAST regime.

== WHAT TUNGSTEN MUST NOW BECOME ==
The question was always wrong. We asked 'what is this cell's edge?' -- which PRESUMES A STABLE ANSWER EXISTS. It does not. The question is:
   'WHICH SIDE OF THE FLIP ARE WE CURRENTLY ON, AND HOW DO WE SURVIVE BEING WRONG ABOUT IT?'
A1 REGIME OF THE EDGE (not of the market). Model the SECOND-ORDER process. Not 'is the market trending' but 'is ASIA x cold currently in its POSITIVE or NEGATIVE phase?' Every cell gets a state machine: POSITIVE / NEGATIVE / TRANSITIONING / UNKNOWN. This object has never been modelled and it is the only one that matters.
A2 FLIP DETECTOR. Learn the transition dynamics OF THE SIGN, not the level. Per cell: mean phase duration, flip frequency, and observable precursors (does variance rise before the mean crosses zero?). A mature stable phase is tradeable. A cell near a historical flip point is RADIOACTIVE.
A3 SIGN-AGNOSTIC EDGE -- THE DEEPEST MOVE. Look again at the table: the MAGNITUDE never changed. |+3.75|, |-1.01|, |+2.66| -- the ENERGY is persistently large; only the DIRECTION is unstable. THEREFORE: extract edge from MAGNITUDE, NOT DIRECTION. On high-|magnitude| cells with uncertain sign, use bracketed both-side entries that profit from MOTION regardless of its sign. This is directly implementable in MT4 and is IMMUNE TO THE EXACT FAILURE THAT HAS DEFEATED EVERY VERSION OF THIS SYSTEM. We have been betting on direction in a market whose direction is the one thing that will not hold still -- while its magnitude was stable all along.
A4 ENSEMBLE OVER PHASES, NOT BARS. Fit one model per phase; at live time retrieve on PHASE similarity, not bar similarity.
A5 INVERSION ALARM. A reliably-inverting signal is INFORMATION, not failure. If OOS performance is significantly negative (t<-3), FLAG SIGN-INVERSION -- it is one line from being right. Never discard an anti-predictive signal. Interrogate it.
A6 SURVIVE THE FLIP. Being wrong about the sign is INEVITABLE, not exceptional. Size assuming the sign may invert DURING the trade. Stops from the cell's own historical adverse excursion. Exposure capped so a full phase-inversion is survivable. Survival is not a constraint here -- it is the core design assumption.

== BUILD ORDER ==
1. Add day-of-week and the 3-way (session x displacement x volatility) conditioning to the state vector. Cheap, measured, immediate.
2. Build the per-cell PHASE STATE MACHINE (A1) and the FLIP DETECTOR (A2). This is the new heart.
3. Implement the INVERSION ALARM (A5) across all existing IC/weight machinery -- any subsystem showing significant negative OOS performance must flag, not fail silently.
4. Prototype SIGN-AGNOSTIC bracketed entry (A3) on the highest-|magnitude| cells.
5. Re-size everything under A6.
Every step a Change Warrant with a numeric prediction, scored after. Additive, reversible, zero-regression. Report the per-cell phase table (cell x window x sign) as the headline deliverable -- that table IS the map of the living edge.

Do not chase a stable number. There isn't one. Build the machine that knows which way the living thing is currently breathing.
